name: Siddarth Raman
role: CTO, The Professeer; Researcher, XKDR Forum
body: Siddarth is the Chief Technology Officer of The Professeer and a researcher at XKDR Forum, where he has studied courts and legal system performance since 2023. He was earlier an independent consultant working with Bain & Co, Callan Consulting, and NGOs across technology, government, and the social sector, and volunteered with Mumbai's municipal corporation during the pandemic.
